text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, I'd like this yokan dessert, please.

text_block_list.name: Candy Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. It's rare to see you buying confectionery,
Yaeno. Is this a gift for someone?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: No, I just thought I'd buy some for myself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I don't usually go for sweet snacks, but for some
reason I have an irresistible craving right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's possible that Yaeno Muteki is still fatigued
from her recent races. It looks like I'll probably
need to rethink her upcoming race schedule.
